add.description: Add default quantity handling logic in LLD specification: if quantity is not provided in request, default to 1. Update API contract documentation to reflect optional quantity parameter.
add.reason: Story requires POST /api/v1/cart/items endpoint with default quantity: 1, but LLD specifies POST /cart with quantity as required field in request body without default value handling.

add.requirement_reference: Empty cart state must trigger specific UI redirection ('continue shopping' link)
add.description: Add business rule in Section 4.2 (Business Rules): 'When cart is empty (itemCount = 0), system must return empty cart indicator and frontend must display continue shopping redirection link.' Add corresponding API response field for empty state.
add.reason: Story explicitly requires 'Empty cart state must trigger specific UI redirection (continue shopping link)', but LLD does not specify this business rule or UI behavior.

add.requirement_reference: CartItem (Entity containing Product Reference, Quantity, and current Price Snapshot)
add.description: Modify CartItem schema to include 'priceAtAddition' field to capture price snapshot when item is added to cart. Add business logic to compare with current product price and handle price change scenarios.
add.reason: Story requires 'current Price Snapshot' in CartItem entity to handle price changes, but LLD CartItem schema only has price field without snapshot/versioning mechanism.

modify.required_change: Update all API endpoint paths in LLD Section 5 to include /api/v1 prefix for consistency with API versioning strategy. Update base path configuration in API Gateway.
modify.reason: API endpoint path mismatch: Story specifies /api/v1/cart/* pattern but LLD uses /cart/* pattern without version prefix.

modify.current_state: GET /cart response includes items array with price and quantity, but no explicit subtotal field per item.
modify.required_change: Modify GET /cart response schema to include 'subtotal' field in each CartItem object (calculated as price * quantity). Update Section 5.1 API response example.
modify.reason: Story requires 'individual subtotals' in GET cart response, but LLD response schema does not include per-item subtotal calculation.

modify.current_state: Section 4.2 mentions recalculation but lacks explicit trigger specification for PUT operations.
modify.required_change: Enhance Section 4.2 Business Rules to explicitly state: 'Upon any PUT /cart/items/{itemId} operation, system must immediately recalculate item subtotal and cart total before returning response.' Add this as mandatory post-update operation.
modify.reason: Story emphasizes 'Automatic recalculation of subtotal and total upon any quantity mutation', but LLD does not explicitly specify real-time recalculation trigger mechanism.

delete.description: Remove Cart Summary Widget and Mini Cart Icon (header) components from LLD or move to future enhancement section if not in current story scope.
delete.reason: LLD Section 3 includes 'Cart Summary Widget' and 'Mini Cart Icon' components not mentioned in Story presentation layer needs.

delete.description: Remove or reduce performance, scalability, and availability requirements in Section 7 if over-engineered for current Story scope. Recommend adding NFR acceptance criteria to Story if needed.
delete.reason: LLD Section 7 includes extensive performance requirements (response time <200ms, 10000 concurrent users, 99.9% uptime) not specified in Story.
